name: HR_GEN_AI_DOCUMENTS_VL
query: SELECT B.DOCUMENT_ID, B.TOOL_ID, B.STATUS, B.DOCUMENT_CREATED_DATE, B.DOCUMENT_PUBLISHED_DATE, B.DOCUMENT_DELETED_DATE, B.OWNER_ID, B.OWNER_NAME, B.INTERNAL_NAME, B.INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, T.NAME, T.DESCRIPTION FROM HR_GEN_AI_DOCUMENTS_B B, HR_GEN_AI_DOCUMENTS_TL T WHERE B.DOCUMENT_ID=T.DOCUMENT_ID AND T.LANGUAGE=USERENV('LANG')
